Menu - Toast on Lenox

Menu
Buckhead
It's no wonder we're serving the best breakfast in Atlanta! Our mouth-watering brunch menu is full of food for the soul! Enjoy something sweet, like our strawberry shortcake French toast, and make it a boozy brunch with a glass of icy frosé, mimosa or signature cocktail. You can also go for our guest favorites, the Lobster Waffle, plus our classic chicken and waffles. Find your favorites and join us for a bite, or order online today.
